text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I knew you could do it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That technique was masterful! Thank you for
showing me something so wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, I must show off this newly acquired plush
toy to my classmates!
